cases.question: Liệt kê 10 đơn hàng đầu tiên trong hệ thống theo thời gian đặt hàng?
cases.generated_sql:
SELECT order_id, customer_id, order_status, order_purchase_timestamp 
FROM olist_orders 
ORDER BY order_purchase_timestamp ASC 
LIMIT 10
cases.gold_sql: SELECT o.order_id, o.customer_id, o.order_status, o.order_purchase_timestamp + INTERVAL 7 HOURS AS thoi_gian_vn FROM olist_orders o ORDER BY o.order_purchase_timestamp ASC LIMIT 10

cases.question: Có bao nhiêu khách hàng trong hệ thống?
cases.generated_sql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT customer_unique_id) AS total_customers
FROM olist_customers LIMIT 1000
cases.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT customer_unique_id) AS total_customers FROM olist_customers LIMIT 1

cases.question: Liệt kê tất cả trạng thái đơn hàng có trong hệ thống?

UNION
SELECT DISTINCT order_status FROM bronze_rt_orders_sim LIMIT 1000
cases.gold_sql: SELECT DISTINCT order_status FROM olist_orders ORDER BY order_status LIMIT 20

cases.question: Liệt kê 10 sản phẩm có nhiều ảnh nhất?

FROM olist_products
ORDER BY product_photos_qty DESC

cases.question: Liệt kê 10 người bán đầu tiên tại thành phố São Paulo (SP)?

cases.question: Tổng doanh thu từ các đơn hàng đã giao thành công?
cases.generated_sql:
SELECT ROUND(SUM(oi.price), 2) AS total_revenue
FROM olist_order_items oi
JOIN olist_orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id
WHERE o.order_status = 'delivered' LIMIT 1000
cases.gold_sql: SELECT ROUND(SUM(oi.price), 2) AS total_revenue FROM olist_order_items oi JOIN olist_orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id WHERE o.order_status = 'delivered' LIMIT 1

cases.question: Số đơn hàng theo từng trạng thái?
cases.generated_sql:
SELECT order_status, COUNT(order_id) AS total_orders
FROM olist_orders
GROUP BY order_status
ORDER BY total_orders DESC LIMIT 1000
cases.gold_sql: SELECT o.order_status, COUNT(DISTINCT o.order_id) AS total_orders FROM olist_orders o GROUP BY o.order_status ORDER BY total_orders DESC LIMIT 20

cases.question: Doanh thu trung bình mỗi đơn hàng là bao nhiêu?
cases.generated_sql:
SELECT ROUND(SUM(oi.price) / COUNT(DISTINCT o.order_id), 2) AS avg_revenue_per_order
FROM olist_order_items oi
JOIN olist_orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id
WHERE o.order_status = 'delivered' LIMIT 1000
cases.gold_sql: SELECT ROUND(AVG(order_revenue), 2) AS avg_revenue_per_order FROM (SELECT oi.order_id, SUM(oi.price) AS order_revenue FROM olist_order_items oi JOIN olist_orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id WHERE o.order_status = 'delivered' GROUP BY oi.order_id) subq LIMIT 1

cases.question: Số đơn hàng theo tháng trong năm 2017?
cases.generated_sql:
SELECT date_format(o.order_purchase_timestamp, 'yyyy-MM') AS month, COUNT(DISTINCT o.order_id) AS total_orders
FROM olist_orders o
WHERE year(o.order_purchase_timestamp) = 2017
GROUP BY date_format(o.order_purchase_timestamp, 'yyyy-MM')
ORDER BY month LIMIT 1000
cases.gold_sql: SELECT date_format(o.order_purchase_timestamp, 'yyyy-MM') AS month, COUNT(DISTINCT o.order_id) AS total_orders FROM olist_orders o WHERE year(o.order_purchase_timestamp) = 2017 GROUP BY date_format(o.order_purchase_timestamp, 'yyyy-MM') ORDER BY month LIMIT 20

cases.question: Phương thức thanh toán nào phổ biến nhất?

cases.question: Doanh thu theo từng quý?
cases.generated_sql:
SELECT 
  year(o.order_purchase_timestamp) AS yr, 
  quarter(o.order_purchase_timestamp) AS qtr, 
  ROUND(SUM(oi.price), 2) AS quarterly_revenue, 
  COUNT(DISTINCT o.order_id) AS total_orders 
FROM olist_order_items oi

WHERE o.order_status = 'delivered'

cases.gold_sql: SELECT year(o.order_purchase_timestamp) AS yr, quarter(o.order_purchase_timestamp) AS qtr, ROUND(SUM(oi.price), 2) AS quarterly_revenue, COUNT(DISTINCT o.order_id) AS total_orders FROM olist_order_items oi JOIN olist_orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id WHERE o.order_status = 'delivered' GROUP BY year(o.order_purchase_timestamp), quarter(o.order_purchase_timestamp) ORDER BY yr, qtr LIMIT 20

cases.question: Tổng phí vận chuyển theo từng bang của khách hàng?
cases.generated_sql:
SELECT c.customer_state, ROUND(SUM(oi.freight_value), 2) AS total_freight_value
FROM ai_analyst.ecommerce.olist_order_items oi
JOIN ai_analyst.ecommerce.olist_orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id
JOIN ai_analyst.ecommerce.olist_customers c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id
WHERE o.order_status = 'delivered'
GROUP BY c.customer_state
ORDER BY total_freight_value DESC LIMIT 1000
cases.gold_sql: SELECT c.customer_state, ROUND(SUM(oi.freight_value), 2) AS total_freight FROM olist_order_items oi JOIN olist_orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id JOIN olist_customers c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id GROUP BY c.customer_state ORDER BY total_freight DESC LIMIT 30

cases.question: Trung bình số sản phẩm (items) trong mỗi đơn hàng?

FROM (

) AS order_counts LIMIT 1000
cases.gold_sql: SELECT ROUND(AVG(item_count), 2) AS avg_items_per_order FROM (SELECT order_id, COUNT(order_item_id) AS item_count FROM olist_order_items GROUP BY order_id) subq LIMIT 1

cases.question: Người bán nào có doanh thu cao nhất? Cho biết thành phố và bang của họ?

    oi.seller_id,

cases.question: Thời gian giao hàng trung bình theo từng bang của khách hàng?

cases.question: Sản phẩm có giá bán cao nhất thuộc danh mục nào (tên tiếng Anh)?

cases.question: Top 10 khách hàng có tổng chi tiêu cao nhất?
cases.generated_sql:
SELECT c.customer_unique_id, ROUND(SUM(p.payment_value), 2) AS total_spent

cases.question: Tỷ lệ giao hàng trễ là bao nhiêu phần trăm?
cases.generated_sql:
SELECT 
  COUNT(CASE WHEN o.order_delivered_customer_date > o.order_estimated_delivery_date THEN 1 END) AS late_deliveries, 
  COUNT(*) AS total_delivered, 
  ROUND(COUNT(CASE WHEN o.order_delivered_customer_date > o.order_estimated_delivery_date THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 2) AS late_percentage 
FROM ai_analyst.ecommerce.olist_orders o 
WHERE o.order_status = 'delivered' 
  AND o.order_delivered_customer_date IS NOT NULL LIMIT 1000
cases.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN o.order_delivered_customer_date > o.order_estimated_delivery_date THEN 1 END) AS late_deliveries, COUNT(*) AS total_delivered, ROUND(COUNT(CASE WHEN o.order_delivered_customer_date > o.order_estimated_delivery_date THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 2) AS late_percentage FROM olist_orders o WHERE o.order_status = 'delivered' AND o.order_delivered_customer_date IS NOT NULL LIMIT 1

cases.question: Thời gian giao hàng nhanh nhất và lâu nhất là bao nhiêu ngày?
cases.generated_sql:
SELECT 
  MIN(DATEDIFF(order_delivered_customer_date, order_purchase_timestamp)) AS fastest_delivery_days,
  MAX(DATEDIFF(order_delivered_customer_date, order_purchase_timestamp)) AS slowest_delivery_days
FROM olist_orders
WHERE order_status = 'delivered' 
  AND order_delivered_customer_date IS NOT NULL 
  AND order_purchase_timestamp IS NOT NULL LIMIT 1000
cases.gold_sql: SELECT MIN(datediff(o.order_delivered_customer_date, o.order_purchase_timestamp)) AS min_delivery_days, MAX(datediff(o.order_delivered_customer_date, o.order_purchase_timestamp)) AS max_delivery_days, ROUND(AVG(datediff(o.order_delivered_customer_date, o.order_purchase_timestamp)), 1) AS avg_delivery_days FROM olist_orders o WHERE o.order_status = 'delivered' AND o.order_delivered_customer_date IS NOT NULL LIMIT 1

cases.question: Tỷ lệ giao hàng trễ theo từng bang của khách hàng?
cases.generated_sql:
SELECT 
  c.customer_state, 
  COUNT(o.order_id) AS total_delivered,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN o.order_delivered_customer_date > o.order_estimated_delivery_date THEN 1 END) AS late_deliveries,
  ROUND(COUNT(CASE WHEN o.order_delivered_customer_date > o.order_estimated_delivery_date THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 2) AS late_percentage
FROM olist_orders o
JOIN olist_customers c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id
WHERE o.order_status = 'delivered'
  AND o.order_delivered_customer_date IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY c.customer_state
ORDER BY late_percentage DESC LIMIT 1000
cases.gold_sql: SELECT c.customer_state, COUNT(*) AS total_delivered, COUNT(CASE WHEN o.order_delivered_customer_date > o.order_estimated_delivery_date THEN 1 END) AS late_count, ROUND(COUNT(CASE WHEN o.order_delivered_customer_date > o.order_estimated_delivery_date THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 2) AS late_pct FROM olist_orders o JOIN olist_customers c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id WHERE o.order_status = 'delivered' AND o.order_delivered_customer_date IS NOT NULL GROUP BY c.customer_state ORDER BY late_pct DESC LIMIT 30

cases.question: Danh sách đơn hàng bị giao trễ nhiều nhất (chênh lệch ngày lớn nhất)?
cases.generated_sql:
SELECT o.order_id, 
       o.order_purchase_timestamp, 
       o.order_delivered_customer_date,

       DATEDIFF(o.order_delivered_customer_date, o.order_estimated_delivery_date) AS days_late

cases.gold_sql: SELECT o.order_id, o.order_purchase_timestamp + INTERVAL 7 HOURS AS thoi_gian_mua_vn, o.order_estimated_delivery_date + INTERVAL 7 HOURS AS ngay_du_kien_vn, o.order_delivered_customer_date + INTERVAL 7 HOURS AS ngay_giao_thuc_te_vn, datediff(o.order_delivered_customer_date, o.order_estimated_delivery_date) AS days_late FROM olist_orders o WHERE o.order_status = 'delivered' AND o.order_delivered_customer_date > o.order_estimated_delivery_date ORDER BY days_late DESC LIMIT 10

cases.question: Số đơn hàng giao trễ theo từng tháng?
cases.generated_sql:
SELECT 
  date_format(o.order_estimated_delivery_date, 'yyyy-MM') AS month, 
  COUNT(o.order_id) AS late_orders
FROM olist_orders o
WHERE o.order_status = 'delivered'
  AND o.order_delivered_customer_date > o.order_estimated_delivery_date

cases.gold_sql: SELECT oi.seller_id, s.seller_city, s.seller_state, ROUND(AVG(oi.freight_value), 2) AS avg_freight, COUNT(DISTINCT oi.order_id) AS total_orders FROM olist_order_items oi JOIN olist_sellers s ON oi.seller_id = s.seller_id JOIN olist_orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id WHERE o.order_status = 'delivered' GROUP BY oi.seller_id, s.seller_city, s.seller_state HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT oi.order_id) >= 50 ORDER BY avg_freight ASC LIMIT 10
